text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "rundll32.exe was used to load comsvcs.dll and execute its MiniDump function, targeting a process (implied lsass.exe by filename) and writing a memory dump to a temporary file. This is a common technique for credential dumping.",
  "indicators": [
    "credential dumping",
    "comsvcs.dll MiniDump",
    "lsass.dmp",
    "rundll32.exe abuse",
    "powershell parent process"
  ]
}
